raw_reaction: 天晴れだ　生涯貴様を忘れることはないだろう
reason: The solution uses the original stopping time, correctly identifies E[tau] as the total mass of the killed cumulative-sum Green measure, derives the renewal density equation g(x)=1+int_0^x g(y)dy from independence and uniform transition density, and obtains e through a genuinely distinct potential-theoretic compression rather than a renamed factorial sum.
